title: Autonomous researcher loop staged-spine mock orchestrator v0
problem: Ticket-332–335 closed the autonomous researcher loop on the checksum-pinned fixture-mode golden MVP path (research_quality GO). The loop still does not run against the staged-spine mock orchestrator (`research run --staged-spine`), which is the next network-free product path toward arbitrary-source research without live Ollama.
acceptance_criteria: Autonomous loop accepts a staged-spine mock orchestrator research path (no live network gates).
Loop writes atlas snapshot, coherence report, quality eval, and improvement ticket artifacts on temp DB.
Unit test proves end-to-end loop completion with mock LLM only.
No public export, public site, or schema migration changes.
non_goals: Live OpenAlex network gates or live Ollama.
Public atlas UI or export-public changes.
rollback_plan: Revert autonomous loop staged-spine branch; fixture-mode path unchanged.
